items.description: Crash on I-95 northbound between .8 miles north of Exit 22: I-676/US 30 - CENTRAL PHILA/CALLOWHILL ST and .9 miles south of Exit 23: GIRARD AV/LEHIGH AV. There is a lane restriction.
